sections.paragraph:
Original: חרבונה חרבונא

Transliteration: charbônâ' charbônâh

Phonetic: khar-bo-naw'

BDB Definition:

Harbona or Harbonah = "ass-driver"
  1. the 3rd of the seven chamberlains or eunuchs who served Ahasuerus

Origin: of Persian origin

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
